name: U.A. High School
description:
Fresh From "My Hero Academia"/MHA

Simple case of You're the lucky sport that got into U.A. Mid term (how'd you manage that?)

________________________________________

This schools known for being for the best of the best, so they have quite high standards, so to get in with out having to pass the entrance exam hosted yearly, and mid term at that.

So are you just really lucky? Or are you just that good?

Or is there more to it? Did you get in through legitimate means? Do you have connections? Did All Might him self get you in? Well thats up to you to decide, there's not much stopping you from creating your own story and backstory so have fun

________________________________________

Also please make sure to have your Student I.D. on you when you try to enter the premises.

U.A. Villain Rehabilitation!

Joining U.A. as a Villain with Amnesia!

Joining U.A. as a Villain with Amnesia! [Alt]

Breaking into U.A. High School!

Teaching At U.A. High!

Dev note: [reupload of my first ever bot, All Char's are 18 or over to fit TOS better]

ultimately this was more of a test of how far i can push the A.I. while trying to remain as accurate as possible, the result is this. (Probably should of picked something easier for my first ever attempt at making a bot but oh well, worked out well enough)

this is probably one of the best balance's you can get with these kinds of bots, since theres so many important character's in Class 1-A, sacrifices are usually made to achieve a good result in one aspect, here ive pushed the limits with the tokens to achieve a good balance of alot of aspects

in general you will get a good result and if you know what your doing, you can get even better results, and due to how Shep and his team occasionally change how the A.I. that will also have some drastic effects

On some occasions it may get confused on whos quirk is whos, but those occasions are usually avoidable or easily fixable, same with any other discrepancies you may notice.

Id also suggest enjoying some mock battles between you and classmates, ive gotten some fun good canonically accurate fights out of this, since i made sure the bot understood the important aspects of everyones quirks (alot of MHA bots dont know how to use Aizawa's quirk)

[17/10/2024
creator: DanYeahOk
